reviews.name: Susan Tuck
reviews.text: Have used Sprinkler Medic in the past. They always show up on time and fix any problems in a professional manner.  I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Calvin Blackwell
reviews.text: The technician was very thorough and quick. My BillPay has scheduled payment 17 Mar 2026

reviews.name: Theo Vernon
reviews.text: Gareth Duvall is very kind and thorough with his work. I appreciate him.

reviews.name: Birgit Gatlin
reviews.text: Chandler was on time and very friendly. He had to replace 2 heads that were leaking and did so very efficiently. Would highly recommend.

reviews.name: buy used
reviews.text: Very expensive and not completed

reviews.name: Peggy Kretzer
reviews.text: Wonderful service! Thanks-

reviews.name: Teresa Smalley
reviews.text: Scheduled visit to start spring service.  Low water pressure revealed a leak from recent city dig to repair gutter leak from under the street.  Other sprinkler head repairs fixed promptly.  First rate service with tech Gareth explaining each step as he went.

reviews.name: John Chizmar
reviews.text: Trustworthy and dependable.  They never try to sell you unnecessary repairs or upgrades.

reviews.name: Adrian Jimenez
reviews.text: Sprinkler Medic showed up on time for a Spring Start-Up service,

reviews.name: Allen McDavid
reviews.text: On time and professional!

reviews.name: Charlotte Ball
reviews.text: Technician(Chandler)arrived on time and introduced himself. Thoroughly checked the sprinkler system and informed me of some issues with some of the aged sprinkler heads. Repairs were done quickly and efficiently. Chandler answered all my questions. Good work!

reviews.name: Nancy Bucher
reviews.text: Very dependable, very professional. I have been using their services for years, both for installation of a new system and regularly scheduled maintenance checks, as well as fast on-call service.

reviews.name: George Gallo
reviews.text: Spring startup. Made adjustments, advised us on duration of each zone (plants, grass), timing, etc. Answered my dumb questions. Kept us informed on arrival time and even got there a bit early. Great service from knowledgeable folks. Will be using again.

reviews.name: Kirk Wimsett
reviews.text: Very professional and got my sprinkler system working great!  Prompt and very friendly

reviews.name: Marlene Parker
reviews.text: Chandler tested the system and was very polite and helpful in answering all my questions.

reviews.name: Michael Thome
reviews.text: Very please with the quality of Chandler's work.  He is very polite and professional.  He identified a few things that needed fixing and then fixed them with my approval.  Sprinkler Medic is definitely our go to company for our sprinkler/irrigation needs.  Great Job!!

reviews.name: Charlie
reviews.text: Takoma kept me informed as to his arrival time, efficiently serviced the sprinkler system, fixed all issues with the system, and had a great demeanor!  Thanks!

reviews.name: Brenda Rust
reviews.text: Gareth was very knowledgeable and efficient.  He checked the sprinklers to make sure they all worked.  He answered all my questions and was very nice and courteous.  Gareth represented Sprinkler Medics very well.

reviews.name: Jacquelyn Summers
reviews.text: Gareth was spectacular!  He identified some issues with our sprinklers and fixed them quickly.  He is always so pleasant and competent.

reviews.name: Nancy Mohlere
reviews.text: Jimmy was courteous and checked everything very well.  We feel good about our sprinkler system and know we can call if there is ever a problem.

reviews.name: Elaine Edwards
reviews.text: Gareth was very professional.  He completed the activation and fixed a few issues.  Looking forward to the coming watering season😎 …

reviews.name: Jimmy Valrie
reviews.text: OUTSTANDING customer service. Technician is very knowledgeable of the sprinkler systems

reviews.name: D M
reviews.text: Awesome service!

reviews.name: Ali Morgan
reviews.text: We had a good experience. We learned through out increasing utility bill that we had a leak in our irrigation system. The first company I called couldn't come out for two weeks. Sprinkler Medic came out the next morning, found the leak immediately and repaired it. The price was about what I anticipated. The only thing I disagree with was being prompted to tip when paying electronically.

reviews.name: Sandra Talley
reviews.text: As always, they got the problem fixed promptly!

reviews.name: Marshall Eubanks
reviews.text: Great job- knowledgeable, efficient and professional.

reviews.name: Kevin Arflack
reviews.text: Rating service this time lacking and troubling. Was out of town when service for wintersation shut off was performed. Representative left water shut off half engaged. Wife called saying sprinkler water was running. I told her to call rep again. He came out and adjusted shut off. Also got a call from my neighbor that their house water was shut off and he had to turn it back on.. Rep accidentally turned my neighbors water off with out knowing what he had done. Need to please be more careful next time.

reviews.name: Wendy James
reviews.text: I wish all of my contractors were this responsive! They answer the phone when you call, they show up for your appointment and their work is completed in a timely manner.

reviews.name: Peg Heeschen
reviews.text: Quick and courteous service.  Recommend highly.

reviews.name: Amy Reed
reviews.text: Service person was prompt and knowledgeable and did a great job

reviews.name: nate erickson
reviews.text: Technicians were prompt and respectful

reviews.name: Al Patterson
reviews.text: Has my sprinkler system maintenance and winterization process on auto pilot.  Outstanding service and value!

reviews.name: Laura Parker
reviews.text: The guys are always very nice and we have used them for a few years now.  They even put in a drain and line in our front yard to help with water issues due to driveway topography.

reviews.name: Nancy Robertson
reviews.text: Reliable company with responsible employees. I have always had a good result with reasonable prices from Sprinkler Medic.
